Stays

Compare stays as part of the destination planning journey

Accommodation is presented as part of the full travel decision, so travelers can compare lodge style, location logic, and trip pacing instead of choosing a stay in isolation.

Stay Directory

Browse camps, lodges, boutique hotels, and practical stopovers

Some travelers need a honeymoon-ready tented camp, others need an efficient city overnight before a game drive. This directory helps them compare both without losing destination context.

Trek Africa Guide

A minimalist but comprehensive Africa travel directory built to help travelers discover where to go, what to do, where to stay, and where to eat before they book with verified partners.
